what_it_does: Synthesizes and indexes the embedder-pplx file set into a single through-line vision, maps four supporting documents, states a shared mental model, links the work to other company projects, lists resolved and open questions, and proposes a sequencing of verifiable build beats.
observations: The through-line is a one-sentence framing: a dual-interface frame-chooser (Tim by sight, agents by MCP) over accumulating embedding layers.
It names four companion files, each covering a distinct move: leverage/tool requests, instrument dual interface/layers, capabilities as affordances, and Postgres/Supabase substrate.
The mental model is: choose a frame, read the data in it, see it as a lens, keep it as a layer, then compare/override/promote.
It marks one open question as resolved by Tim on 2026-06-15: the instrument authors, it is not read-only.
It proposes migrating from provisional flat files to Postgres/Supabase/pgvector as the real substrate.
It connects the vision to many other company projects via wiki-style links (the seed, the heart, address accumulation, loadout registry, collective cognition, Supabase realtime, keystone/GATE).
It lists remaining forks for Tim: layer slot identity key, substrate timing, default layer visibility, capability priority.
It proposes a three-phase sequence: foundation (embedder migration + substrate), layer operations, then high-leverage affordances.
standouts: The dual-interface frame-chooser concept: one engine serving both Tim by sight and agents by MCP.
Accumulating layers as literal 'one object, many coordinate systems' over a real pgvector substrate.
The resolved stance that the instrument authors data rather than remaining read-only.
conventions: Markdown header hierarchy with an opening one-sentence through-line.
Wiki-style internal links to other documents and sections.
Enumerated lists for moves, questions, and sequencing.
First-person authorial voice and parenthetical asides.
Labels documents as 'living docs' and marks some content as THINK+WRITE.
concerns: Heavy reliance on forward references to companion files not present here, so many terms are asserted rather than defined.
A large portion of the content is speculative planning and unresolved questions rather than decided design.
Dense project-specific neologisms (frame, reading, layer, MRL semantic-zoom, binary full-corpus scale, context-strain) are used without in-file definitions.
The sequencing section states 'none started here; this fire was THINK+WRITE', signaling low implementation maturity.
notes: This is the high-level vision memo for the embedder-pplx work, tying four planned documents into a single 'frame-chooser + accumulating layers' mental model and flagging decisions still pending Tim.
questions: What are the exact operational definitions of 'frame', 'reading', and 'layer' within this file?
How does 'PLAIN pplx' differ technically from the current pplx usage?
What do 'MRL semantic-zoom' and 'binary full-corpus scale' mean as concrete capabilities?
What is 'the seed' geometry and how does it relate to origin-selection and scale?
How exactly does the proposed layer identity tuple map to a database schema?
What is the 'FORM bar' and what does 'interface-is-half' require?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: it states it is an index and synthesis of the embedder-pplx file set, and it performs that indexing and synthesis while adding connective context and open questions.
apparent_themes: Framing as the unifying primitive for reading data.
Accumulating layers as multiple coordinate systems over one address.
Dual human/agent interface over a single engine.
Moving from provisional flat files to a real Postgres/pgvector substrate.
Use and provenance as data-building activity.
intention_signals: It is trying to consolidate the embedder-pplx effort around a coherent architectural vision in which the instrument becomes a frame-choosing, layer-accumulating control surface backed by a real vector database, and to surface remaining product and schema decisions for Tim.
novelty: It treats embedder capabilities (MRL, binary scale, context strain) as adjustable frame knobs on a shared instrument, and conceptualizes embedding outputs not as fixed vectors but as accumulating, address-and-frame-keyed layers.
contribution: Provides a compact through-line and mental model that links the four embedder-pplx documents to each other and to broader company projects; records a resolved design fork and several open forks; and proposes a staged sequence of verifiable build beats.
summary_for_embedding: VISION-OVERVIEW.md is a high-level synthesis of the embedder-pplx file set that frames the instrument as a dual-interface frame-chooser over accumulating, substrate-backed embedding layers and maps the vision to related company projects, open questions, and a proposed build sequence.
intention_for_embedding: It was written to consolidate the embedder-pplx direction into a shared mental model and to flag unresolved architectural forks for Tim.
